summary: A thorough research and brainstorming document that maps out the full landscape of GeoAI problems solvable using OpenStreetMap data, NetworkX, and PyTorch (especially PyTorch Geometric). Covers 8 major problem domains — from traffic prediction to OSM quality assessment — with technical pipelines, library stacks, difficulty ratings, Colab/Kaggle feasibility notes, and concrete project ideas for each domain. Includes a recommended starter project and phased learning path.
